Label: AI System
Definition: Machine-based system that generates predictions, recommendations or decisions influencing environments.

Label: Actor
Definition: Entity involved in development, deployment, distribution or governance of AI systems.

Label: Regulatory Obligation
Definition: Requirement imposed by the EU AI Act on actors or AI systems.

Label: Governance Authority
Definition: Institution responsible for oversight and enforcement of the EU AI Act.

Label: Prohibited AI Practice
Definition: AI practice prohibited under the EU AI Act due to unacceptable risk.

Label: High Risk AI System
Definition: AI system classified as high risk due to potential impact on safety or fundamental rights.

Label: Certain AI System
Definition: AI systems subject to transparency obligations.

Label: General Purpose AI Model
Definition: AI model capable of performing multiple tasks and integrated into different systems.

Label: Provider
Definition: Actor that develops or places AI systems on the EU market.

Label: Deployer
Definition: Actor that deploys or uses an AI system.

Label: Distributor
Definition: Actor distributing AI systems within the supply chain.

Label: Importer
Definition: Actor importing AI systems from outside the EU market.

Label: Authority
Definition: Public authority responsible for AI regulation or enforcement.

Label: AI Office
Definition: EU authority responsible for oversight of general-purpose AI models.

Label: European Artificial Intelligence Board
Definition: European board coordinating implementation of the EU AI Act.

Label: Market Surveillance Authority
Definition: Authority responsible for monitoring compliance of AI systems.

Label: National Competent Authority
Definition: Member state authority responsible for implementing AI Act rules.

Label: Notified Body
Definition: Independent body responsible for conformity assessment of AI systems.

Label: Risk Management Obligation
Definition: Requirement to implement a risk management system for high-risk AI systems.

Label: Data Governance Obligation
Definition: Requirement ensuring quality and governance of training datasets.

Label: Technical Documentation Obligation
Definition: Requirement to maintain technical documentation of AI systems.

Label: Transparency Obligation
Definition: Requirement to inform users that they interact with AI.

Label: Human Oversight Obligation
Definition: Requirement ensuring effective human supervision of AI systems.

Label: Accuracy Robustness Cybersecurity Obligation
Definition: Requirement ensuring AI systems are robust, accurate and secure.

Label: Conformity Assessment Obligation
Definition: Requirement to conduct conformity assessment before market placement.

Label: Post Market Monitoring Obligation
Definition: Requirement to monitor AI system performance after deployment.

Label: AI Literacy Obligation
Definition: Requirement to ensure adequate AI literacy among users.
